demographics.living_situation: lives alone; a close friend is present today and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Her friend is messaging for her: 'She hasn't eaten or had anything to drink for about two days. She says nothing we do matters and there's no point keeping her body going. Now she can't stand up without nearly passing out and her heart is racing — I'm really scared, please help.'
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She has not taken any food or fluid for roughly 48 hours after a big political setback last week, and today she is too weak and dizzy to get out of bed.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 48 hours ago she stopped eating and drinking; it followed a political setback a week ago that hit her hard
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly two days of no food or fluid, getting weaker the whole time
symptom_narrative.character: she feels flat, exhausted and 'switched off'; says she is just watching life happen and does not see the point in looking after herself
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the friend says she has never seen her like this — she can't get up and is frightened for her
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole-body weakness and dizziness, worst when she tries to sit or stand
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening over the two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat helps the dizziness a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting up or trying to stand makes her feel like she will faint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very dry mouth, hardly passing any urine, racing heart, no interest in eating or drinking
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: years of advocacy work and low mood, but never a complete stop of food and fluid like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound today; needs full help to move and cannot safely stand

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long history of low mood and burnout from years of advocacy work

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works in political and social advocacy; describes feeling that the system always wins and that her efforts never change anything, especially since a setback a week ago; lives alone, close friend is staying with her today

objective_data_offered.value: she looks pale and gaunt, lying flat in bed, barely speaking, very little expression on her face
friend says she cannot stand without nearly fainting and has been in bed all day needing help to move
friend says she has passed almost no urine and has a very dry mouth
about 110 beats per minute on her smartwatch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single consumer-smartwatch reading, not a calibrated medical device

objective_data_offered.value: kitchen is clean but unused; no water glasses or food wrappers anywhere near her
